description_long: This object depicts a police officer in mid-motion, wearing a dark tactical uniform with a bulletproof vest labeled 'POLICE' on the chest and back. The officer's right arm and part of the torso are disintegrating into small, fragmented particles, giving a dramatic, dynamic effect. The uniform consists of a long-sleeve navy shirt, matching tactical pants, and black boots, with a utility belt holding various pouches. The officer has a bald or closely shaved head and is not wearing any headgear. The left arm is raised, possibly in a defensive or action-oriented gesture. The overall appearance is that of a modern urban police officer, but the partial disintegration adds a surreal or stylized element.
description: A modern police officer in tactical gear, partially disintegrating into particles, with a 'POLICE' vest and utility belt.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'POLICE' vest, raised left arm, and dramatic particle disintegration of the right arm and torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extent of the disintegration, with the left arm and side of the face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'POLICE' label on the back of the vest and the fragmented right side.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the disintegration effect and the officer's forward-leaning posture.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long-sleeve navy shirt, matching tactical pants, black bulletproof vest labeled 'POLICE', and black boots; includes utility belt with pouches.
